title: Behavior Snacking
description: Allows the mob to take a load off and snack on food that it found nearby.

items.description: Items the entity will snack on.

snacking_cooldown.description: Maximum cooldown in seconds between snacks.

snacking_cooldown_min.description: Minimum cooldown in seconds between snacks.

snacking_stop_chance.description: Probability per tick of stopping snacking.
